model_description: Weighted linear combination of feature signal rates from 474-observation Saudi Instagram corpus. Weights: pattern 30%, media_type 18%, setting 14%, lighting 10%, composition 10%, occasion 9%, register 5%, tone 5%, dialect 3%, heritage_vs_modern 4%, hospitality_cues 2%. Confidence-adjusted per signal: full weight at n≥15, half weight at n=3, below threshold falls back to corpus baseline (0.54).
